channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Move over Magic: Nuggets star Nikola Jokic goes past Johnson on career list with 139th triple-double
item.description: There are moments when Nikola Jokic does things on the court that seem to defy reason — almost magical.
item.dc:creator: Tom Withers, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Packers head coach, Lions fan separated on field before rivalry game
item.description: Before Thursday night's NFC North clash between the Green Bay Packers and Detroit Lions, Matt LeFleur and a Detroit fan had to be separated on the field.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Packers coach gets into pregame swearing match with Detroit Lions fan holding flag for anthem
item.description: The coach of the Packers got into a pregame swearing match with a Detroit Lions fan who was on the field to hold the giant American flag for the National Anthem.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: NBA returning to China for pair of Suns-Nets preseason games in 2025, AP source says
item.description: The NBA is returning to China next season, striking a deal to play preseason games there more than five years after the league was effectively banned over Commissioner Adam Silver not punishing Daryl Morey for tweeting support of anti-government protesters in Hong Kong.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ashton Jeanty confirms departure from Boise State after this season
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Boise State running back and Heisman Trophy candidate Ashton Jeanty confirmed Thursday that this will be his last season at the university.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The A’s clear the last major hurdle for a $1.75 billion Las Vegas stadium
item.description: Groundbreaking likely will take place in the spring to allow Oakland's former team a scheduled opening for the 2028 season in Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Utah expected to hire Jason Beck as offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - While Kyle Whittingham's future is still undecided, it looks like another former BYU player is joining the Utes coaching staff.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Luis Severino and Athletics agree to $67 million, 3-year contract, AP sources say
item.description: Right-hander Luis Severino and the Athletics have agreed to a $67 million, three-year contract, two people familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The people spoke on condition of anonymity Thursday because the agreement had not yet been announced by the team.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Blackhawks fire coach Luke Richardson in his 3rd season after league-worst start
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago Blackhawks fired coach Luke Richardson on Thursday, signaling their frustration with the state of the franchise's rebuilding project. Chicago has dropped four in a row to fall to an NHL-worst 8-16-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: BYU loses in first round of NCAA Tournament
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. — The BYU women's volleyball team was making its 13th consecutive appearance in the NCAA Tournament. But for the first time since 2005, the Cougars are going home after losing in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: The A's clear the last major hurdle for a $1.75 billion Las Vegas stadium
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Las Vegas Stadium Authority approved lease, non-relocation and development documents Thursday to clear the last major hurdles for the Athletics to construct a $1.75 billion stadium on the Strip and bring Major League Baseball to the expanding sports market.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Manny Pacquiao, winner of titles in a record 8 weight classes, elected to Boxing Hall of Fame
item.description: Manny Pacquiao, who won titles in a record eight weight classes from flyweight to super welterweight while becoming one of boxing's biggest draws, was elected Thursday to the International Boxing Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: North Carolina interviews Bill Belichick for head coaching job, AP sources say
item.description: North Carolina has interviewed former New England Patriots coach and six-time Super Bowl champion Bill Belichick for its head coaching position, two people with knowledge of the situation said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tottenham joins list of top Premier League teams to lose at Bournemouth as fans jeer Postecoglou
item.description: Manchester City, Arsenal, and now Tottenham. The list of top Premier League teams beaten at Bournemouth this season is growing. Dean Huijsen took advantage of Tottenham’s weakness at set pieces to head home a 17th-minute winner in Bournemouth’s 1-0 victory on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NHL to host free outdoor fan festival ahead of Winter Classic in Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The National Hockey League announced they will be hosting a free outdoor fan festival ahead of the Winter Classic in Chicago. The fan festival will begin at 10:30 a.m. on Tuesday, Dec. 31, in the Chicago Cubs parking lot at 1126 West Grace Street and run until 3:30 p.m. CT.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Pride, bragging rights and more than $115M at stake when final college playoff rankings come out
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — There's more than just school pride and bragging rights to all that bellyaching over who might be in and who might be out of college football 's first 12-team playoff.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears interim head coach has lost over 20 pounds amid team's coaching staff changes
item.description: Chicago Bears interim head coach Thomas Brown received two promotions due to firings last month, and the added responsibilities have helped him lose 22 pounds.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A’s agree to richest contract in franchise history months after leaving Oakland: report
item.description: Severino will receive $67 million guaranteed from the A's, usurping the $66 million that Eric Chavez received in 2004
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Former White Sox player, analyst Bill Melton dies at 79
item.description: CHICAGO — "Beltin'" Bill Melton has died at the age of 79. According to a press release from the team, Melton died early Thursday morning in Phoenix after complications from a brief illness.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: LSU star Flau'Jae Johnson says Unrivaled league 'changing the game' as she joins in NIL partnership
item.description: The new Unrivaled basketball league is jumping into the NIL space as well, with LSU star and rapper Flau'Jae Johnson coming aboard through a partnership.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil uniforms ahead of inaugural WNBA season
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Valkyries won’t take the court for their inaugural 2025 season until May 16, but fans are getting an early look at the WNBA team’s uniforms which were unveiled Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: St. Pete City Council votes in favor of bond purchase to pay for Rays stadium
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council voted Thursday in favor of purchasing bonds that would fund a portion of the new Rays stadium and the redevelopment of the Gas Plant District.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Aggies win MWC opener over Wyoming, 70-67
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The undefeated streak is still going for the Aggies. Ian Martinez scored 17 of his 23 points in the second half to help Utah State defeat Wyoming 70-67 on Wednesday night at The Spectrum. Mason Falslev's layup with 35 seconds left stretched Utah State's lead to 70-64.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: McNeeley scores 17 points as No. 25 UConn rallies to a 76-72 win over No. 15 Baylor
item.description: STORRS, Conn. (AP) — Liam McNeeley scored 17 points and No. 25 UConn came back from an early deficit to beat No. 15 Baylor 76-72 on Wednesday night in the Big 12-Big East Battle.
item.dc:creator: JIM FULLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
